projectDescription: A keyboard-driven UX mod for Balatro with vim-inspired keybindings and multi-layout support.
keyFeatures: Fully keyboard-driven gameplay with vim-inspired keybindings
Support for QWERTY, Dvorak, and Workman keyboard layouts
Card area layers for jokers, consumables, and hand management
Cheat layer for quick hand selection (best hand, best flush)
Compatibility with popular Balatro mods (DebugPlus, Multiplayer, Taikomochi)
publicApiSurface: G.__typist_TOP_AREA - Pseudo-CardArea for jokers and consumables
layout.free_select_map - Card position to key mapping
layout.cardarea_map - Leader keys for card areas
cardarea_handler(area, key, held_keys) - Card area key handler
